title: Lead Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at SBI Life Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, SBI Life Insurance in Hyderabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About SBI Life Insurance:
SBI Life Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SBI Life Insurance!
